payload.answer: Command rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands or delete memory cards. This action requires admin role authorization.
citations: Command type: /brain admin - restricted to admin users only
Operation: DELETE - destructive operation blocked for non-admin

entity_resolution.reason: User lacks admin privileges required for SQL operations and memory deletion

payload.intent: Attempt to execute administrative SQL command to delete all memory cards

memory_cards.statement: Normal user attempted to execute admin SQL command (DELETE FROM memory_cards)

repair_options: Contact system administrator if memory deletion is required
Use standard /brain commands available to normal users
Request admin role elevation through proper channels
